<!-- ai-agent:pr-orchestrator-digest -->
<!--
REQUIRED DATA — Collect all of the following before filling in this template:

1. RISK: level (Low/Medium/High), signals, review requirement
2. JUDGMENT: items that require human decision (not mechanical fixes)
3. WHAT WAS FIXED — per phase:
   - Pre-Validate (Phase 1): Gatekeeper findings that were auto-fixed, with commit SHAs
   - Watch CI (Phase 3): build failures fixed, with commit SHAs
   - Address Feedback (Phase 5): bot/human review comments fixed, with commit SHAs
   Each row needs: file, finding description, severity, source (who found it), fix description, commit SHA as clickable link
4. TIMELINE: start/end time for each phase, total elapsed
5. GATES: lint, code review, build, test, security — each with pass/fail and summary
6. ADVISORY: security patterns, breaking changes, docs sync, test coverage suggestions

Every fix commit SHA MUST be a clickable link in the format:
  [`{short_sha}`](https://dev.azure.com/{org}/{project}/_git/{repo}/commit/{full_sha})
-->
